name: io.github.dgenio/chainweaver
description: Deterministic orchestration layer for MCP agents. Compiles tool sequences into schema-validated flows and exposes each flow as a single MCP tool — no LLM at build or run time.

runtimeArguments.name: --from
runtimeArguments.description: Resolve the MCP extra so a fresh client installs the fastmcp/mcp dependencies the serve command needs.

packageArguments.description: Path to a .flow.yaml/.flow.json file to expose as MCP tools.

packageArguments.name: --tools
packageArguments.description: Python module path exposing Tool instances at top level. Repeatable.
